programmes.show_description: In 18th-century England, a farmer finds a deformed skull, sparking a sinister influence over the village's youth, who fall under the grip of a demonic force. Contains distressing scenes.
8/10. A visit to Marcus's native Lancashire inspires him to introduce some rare breed sheep, and he gets a lesson in growing spices from chilli enthusiast Mothin.
It's April and the fishing season has arrived. Alex and Peter go to sea in an Edwardian trawler. Ruth stays ashore and prepares potted shrimp.
17/20. An antiques expert, a market trader and an upcycler compete to make the most money. Charles Hanson, Melissa Downhill and Anthony Devine visit Kendal.

33/35. Charlie and Chris are in Cheadle to design a safe garden for pastor and PhD student Joy to relax, read, entertain, study and pray in.
8/10. A visit to Marcus's native Lancashire inspires him to introduce some rare breed sheep, and he gets a lesson in growing spices from chilli enthusiast Mothin.
With Empire Day approaching, a paddle steamer comes to the valley. The team pull out all the stops to put on a party for the tourists, including making clotted cream and scones.
2/8. Alan and Val put their savings on the line for a high-tech boat to help them spend time with their family. But first they need to learn how to live on the water.
DIY expert Dave Wellman prepares to repair and replaster a bedroom ceiling in a family home in Essex. 9/20
Dave is in Worcestershire, widening access to a couple's property by building a concrete platform and new gateway. 10/20
4/8. Stefan goes on a crash vegan diet for a month. Are veggie ready meals better for you? The surprising truth about imported vs home grown apples.

An apparently respectable middle-class housewife controls a select group of attractive women who moonlight as hired assassins. Rula Lenska stars. Contains nudity.
Action. Tianhuo Island is paradise in the Pacific. Such a shame it's located in the Ring of Fire, a world-famous volcanic belt. Guess what happens. Jason Isaacs stars.

It's June, and the team heads up to Dartmoor to discover the ways in which Edwardian farmers took advantage of this unique and spectacular landscape to add to their income.
3/8. Seasoned floating homeowners Pat and Sue plan to spend their retirement on a state-of-the-art Dutch barge. But will their expensive tastes sink the project?
Dave Wellman is in Shirley coming to the rescue of two newlyweds as he demonstrates how to repair their rotten floorboards. 11/20
Dave is in Coventry, building a pair of his and hers wardrobes either side of a chimney breast in a master bedroom.12/20
5/8. Sian and Stefan compare pizzas made with real and processed cheese and the fat content of ready meals.

10/10. A trip to Kent inspires a nutty addition to Marcus's farm, and he harvests the bounty of the berry bushes. Last in series.

Riotous early 70s comedy in which an audacious cat burglar steals more than his female victims' jewellery. Contains sexual scenes and 70s social attitudes.
